queries.question: For each award, list the categories they have.
queries.sql: select awards.awardname , categories.categoryname from Awards_Categories join Categories on Awards_Categories.categoriesID = Categories.categoryId join Awards on Awards_Categories.awardsID = Awards.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?awardname ?categoryname WHERE {
  ?awards_categories a :Awards_Categories .
  ?categories a :Categories .
  ?awards_categories p:hasCategories ?categories .
  ?awards a :Awards .
  ?awards_categories p:hasAwards ?awards .
  ?awards p:awardName ?awardname .
  ?categories p:categoryName ?categoryname .
}

queries.question: What categories do all awards have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Categories.categoryName  from Awards_Categories join Categories on Awards_Categories.categoriesID = Categories.categoryId join Awards on Awards_Categories.awardsID = Awards.id   GROUP BY Awards_Categories.categoriesID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Awards_Categories.awardsID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Awards)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the categories that every award has.
